name: backend_early_career
resume_text: Python developer building FastAPI tools, SQL dashboards, and Dockerized APIs. Built backend services for student projects and completed a software engineering internship. 2 years experience.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer Intern
jobs.description: Required: Python, FastAPI, SQL, Docker. Build backend APIs and internal services for product teams.

jobs.title: Junior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Experience with Python, APIs, SQL, and Docker required. Nice to have AWS and CI/CD.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Required: React, TypeScript, leadership, architecture, 6+ years experience.

name: data_profile
resume_text: Data analyst with SQL, pandas, dashboard work, experimentation analysis, and stakeholder reporting. Built reporting pipelines and Power BI dashboards in coursework and internships.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Required: SQL, pandas, analytics, dashboarding. Build reports and partner with product teams.

jobs.title: Product Analyst
jobs.description: Preferred: A/B testing, SQL, experimentation, dashboards, stakeholder communication.

jobs.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Required: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, CI/CD, 5+ years experience.

name: ml_profile
resume_text: Machine learning student building NLP and RAG demos with Python, scikit-learn, PyTorch, and OpenAI APIs. Published chatbot and model evaluation projects. Looking for remote AI internships.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern
jobs.description: Required: Python, machine learning, scikit-learn, experimentation. Bonus: NLP and PyTorch.

jobs.title: AI Engineer Intern
jobs.description: Required: Python, OpenAI API, RAG, prompt engineering. Build AI workflows and evaluation loops.

jobs.title: Senior Account Executive
jobs.description: Required: enterprise pipeline management, quota ownership, 7+ years closing experience.
